action.disabled.no_run_selected: Action is disabled because no run is selected.
action.disabled.run_status_unknown: Action is disabled because the run status is unknown.
action.disabled.run_terminal: Action is disabled because the run has already reached a terminal state.
action.disabled.run_not_running: Action is disabled because the run is not currently running.
